subject: [PATCH v3] mm/mempolicy: track user-defined mempolicy allocations

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the new stats being per-memcg, which may not accurately reflect user-defined policies. Suggested aggregating stats across all memcgs to better track policy-driven allocations.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Agreed with David's concerns about per-memcg stats and suggested an alternative approach to track user-defined policies. Proposed using a new field in the mempolicy structure to store policy-driven allocation counts.

2026-03-17.patch_summary: This patch adds new numa mempolicy allocation counters to track user-defined policies driving allocations on a NUMA node. The counters are exposed per-node in /nodeN/vmstat and globally in /proc/vmstat, providing information needed for investigating pressure on a node.
